dashboard.title: Status
dashboard.subtitle: Global concurrency monitoring and Qwen account pool overview (auto-refresh every 3s).
dashboard.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch status. Please check your session Key in 'Settings'.

endpoints.title: API endpoint pool
endpoints.subtitle: Entry points compatible with mainstream AI protocols. Auth is optional or via API Key.

accounts.title: Account management
accounts.subtitle: Unified management of the upstream account pool. Distinguishes pending activation, rate-limited, banned and invalid states.

errors.activationInProgress: Account is being activated, please refresh later
errors.activationLinkMissing: Could not find activation link or token
errors.refreshAccountsFailed: Failed to refresh accounts. Check your session Key.

messages.registeredPending: Account registered but still requires activation: {{email}}
messages.activatingPending: Account is being activated, please refresh later: {{email}}

form.manualDesc: Log in at chat.qwen.ai first, press F12 to open DevTools, look up the token in Application / Storage › Local Storage and paste the raw value below.
form.warningTitle: Important: paste ONLY the raw token value from Local Storage. Do NOT extract from Network requests or Authorization headers.
form.warningSub: Do not include the 'Bearer' prefix or paste any Authorization text. Email and password are optional; the system validates the token before injecting.
form.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the raw token copied from Local Storage

table.title: Account list
table.empty: No accounts yet. Inject manually or use one-click new account.

tokens.title: API Key distribution
tokens.subtitle: Manage credentials that can access this gateway.
tokens.fetchFailed: Refresh failed, please check your session Key

test.title: Endpoint test
test.subtitle: Test whether your API distribution is working correctly.
test.empty: Send a message to start testing. The system will call /v1/chat/completions.
test.emptyResponse: Empty response (account may be inactive or unavailable)

images.title: Image generation
images.subtitle: Generate AI images via Qwen3.6-Plus. Multiple aspect ratios supported.
images.promptPlaceholder: Describe the image you want to generate. e.g.: cyberpunk style cat, neon lights, ultra-realistic style
images.noImagesReturned: No images returned, please try again
images.loadingHint: Image generation usually takes 10-30 seconds, please wait
images.emptyHint: Enter a description above and click 'Generate image' to start

settings.title: System settings
settings.subtitle: Manage console authentication and gateway runtime configuration.
settings.fetchFailed: Failed to fetch configuration. Please check your session Key.

sessionKey.title: Current session Key
sessionKey.subtitle: Paste your existing API Key here. The console will use it for all admin operations. (Stored in browser local storage.)

core.title: Core concurrency
core.subtitle: Runtime concurrency slots and queue thresholds (changes apply immediately).
core.maxInflightDesc: Concurrent requests per upstream account. Too high may get banned, too low underutilizes.
core.globalMaxInflightDesc: Hard cap on total concurrent requests across all accounts. 0 = unlimited. Maps to Dashboard 'Async tasks' peak.

pool.title: Chat_ID warm pool
pool.subtitle: Pre-built chat_ids skip the upstream /chats/new handshake (0.5~6s). Runtime changes apply immediately.
pool.targetDesc: How many chat_ids to pre-warm per account. Default 5.
pool.ttlDesc: Discard chat_ids older than this. Default 10.
pool.savePoolToast: Warm pool settings saved (effective from next refresh)

modelAliases.title: Automatic model mapping (Model Aliases)
modelAliases.subtitle: Incoming model names will be routed by the gateway to the following actual Qwen models. Edit as standard JSON.
